g.text: Headline eval: full eval_overall_numeric on testmini (n=456); trained column uses best A/B/C headline composite (Phase B).

g.text: Change uses one convention: percentage-valued metrics are absolute percentage-point deltas; tokens and reward use absolute unit deltas. Negative deltas are improvements for rows marked lower better.
